projectDescription: An Angular-based helpdesk SaaS application with a public ticket portal and a role-based admin panel featuring dashboards, ticket management, SLA tracking, and user administration.
keyFeatures: Public ticket submission portal with SLA-based priority routing
Ticket status tracking by label and email (no account required)
Admin dashboard with KPI cards, trend charts, and SLA monitoring
Full ticket lifecycle management: assign, transfer, reclassify, pause, reopen, cancel, archive
Role-based access control with four roles: ADMIN, MESA, AREA, USUARIO
User management for creating, updating, and deactivating agent accounts
Server-Side Rendering (SSR) via Angular Universal for both public and admin apps
Integrated Chart.js visualizations for priority, status, area, category, and hourly distributions
publicApiSurface: POST /api/tickets/consultar — Track a ticket by label and email
GET /api/tickets/dashboard — Fetch all tickets for admin dashboard
GET /api/tickets/:id — Get ticket detail with history
POST /api/tickets/:id/actualizar — Update ticket status, priority, area, and response
POST /api/tickets/:id/asignar — Assign ticket to an agent
POST /api/tickets/:id/transferir — Transfer ticket to another area
POST /api/tickets/:id/reclasificar — Reclassify ticket priority and category
